title: Analyze Edge Streaming
description: Utilize HTTP streaming to personalize content rendered at the edge. Analyze how edge streaming can enhance user experience without compromising CDN cacheability. Design edge-based content delivery strategies that combine static caching with dynamic personalization.
objectives: Utilize HTTP streaming to personalize content rendered at the edge.
Analyze how edge streaming can enhance user experience without compromising CDN cacheability.
Design edge-based content delivery strategies that combine static caching with dynamic personalization.
